svg.title: OptiOra live FinOps control plane
svg.desc: Animated dashboard summary showing live OCI advisor findings, decision-grade ranking, authenticated Advisor Conversation telemetry, action ledger lifecycle state machine, OCI cost report ingestion from bling namespace, and overview action queue.

g.text: Overview: live OCI estate with honest multi-cloud status
Optimization Advisor: provider findings loaded by default
Action Ledger: lifecycle, variance, owner follow-through
Advanced FinOps: decision-grade ranking plus authenticated advisor context
Action Queue links live advisor findings, unattached storage, and open ledger actions directly from the overview.
111 advisor findings, $13.2K/mo advisor savings, 285 unattached volumes.
150 ledger actions, $284.4K/mo planned savings, realized savings tracked separately.
Advisor Conversation now carries the browser session into backend telemetry calls.
OCI runtime access configured. Cost Reports (bling namespace) feed monthly summaries. AWS, Azure, and GCP await credentials.
Provider Advisor loaded by default from live provider scan
Live OCI rows replace the old empty panel.
Right-size flexible shapes using observed utilization
AWS, Azure, and GCP populate here after credentials are configured
Action Ledger: open → planned → approved → executed → verified, owner, realized savings, CSV export.
Lifecycle status filter, owner, realized savings, variance, and CSV export now wired end-to-end
Control tower: tag quality, decision-grade actions, federation, advisor chat auth, OCI cost report ingestion.
